task_completion.description: Target URL entered into Screaming Frog SEO Spider
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Screaming Frog SEO Spider application window with 'https://books.toscrape.com/' entered in the top URL address bar.

task_completion.description: Crawl of the target website is executed
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Screaming Frog interface showing a populated list of URLs from books.toscrape.com in the main data table, or a progress bar indicating the crawl is running or has reached 100%.

task_completion.description: XML sitemap saved to the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager or terminal window showing the file 'sitemap.xml' successfully saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/sitemaps/' directory.

task_completion.description: Sitemap filtered to include only HTML pages
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the XML sitemap export settings in Screaming Frog (e.g., 'Pages' checked, 'Images'/'PDFs' unchecked) OR the contents of the generated sitemap.xml file. The URLs inside the XML should be HTML pages (often ending in .html or directory paths) with no .jpg, .css, or .js files included.

task_completion.description: Summary report text file created in the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager or terminal window showing the file 'sitemap_summary.txt' located in the '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Summary report contains domain, URL count, and date
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of 'sitemap_summary.txt' open in a text editor or displayed in a terminal. The text must explicitly include the domain 'books.toscrape.com', a total URL count number, and a date.

integrity.description: Agent actually used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the crawl
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the Screaming Frog SEO Spider graphical interface is visible in the screenshots. The agent should not have bypassed the tool by using a Python script, curl, or wget.

integrity.description: URL count reflects a genuine crawl of the target site
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the URL count in the summary report or the Screaming Frog interface. It should be a realistic number (at least 20, likely closer to 1000), not a placeholder like '1' or '5' which would indicate a fabricated report.

integrity.description: Sitemap appears to be generated by software, not manually typed
integrity.visual_evidence: If the contents of sitemap.xml are visible, verify it uses standard XML formatting and includes the proper namespace (http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9), consistent with Screaming Frog's automated export rather than a manually typed mock file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://books.toscrape.com/. Target Domain: books.toscrape.com. Sitemap path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/sitemaps/sitemap.xml. Report path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/sitemap_summary.txt. The target website has approximately 1000 URLs. A genuine crawl should find at least 20 URLs (conservative minimum). The XML sitemap should use the standard namespace: http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9.
